flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of the Southwest fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (69.0% → 55.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of the Southwest fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (414 → 346).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of the Southwest fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of the Southwest rose 94% between 2021 and 2024 (6.8% → 13.2%).
